excerpt:
Changes since langchain-xai==1.2.2

release(xai): 1.3.0 (#38984)
feat(core): add `reasoning_effort` as a standard chat model parameter (#38887)
fix: patch Dependabot dependency vulnerabilities (#38853)
chore: bump langsmith from 0.9.5 to 0.10.2 in /libs/partners/xai (#38832)
chore(deps): refresh lockfiles (#38746)
chore(model-profiles): refresh model profile data (#38739)
chore: bump langsmith from 0.8.18 to 0.9.5 in /libs/partners/xai (#38598)
chore: bump pytest from 9.1.0 to 9.1.1 in /libs/partners/xai (#38599)
fix(xai): drop unsupported `stop` parameter (#38335)
chore: bump langsmith from 0.8.16 to 0.8.18 in /libs/partners/xai (#38283)
chore: bump vcrpy from 8.1.1 to 8.2.1 in /libs/partners/xai (#38285)
chore: bump pytest from 9.0.3 to 9.1.0 in /libs/partners/xai (#38239)
chore: bump langsmith from 0.8.14 to 0.8.16 in /libs/partners/xai (#38238)
docs: refresh `README` installation and resources (#38119)
release(core): 1.4.7 (#38111)
fix(core,partners): rename package version trace metadata (#38110)
chore: bump langsmith from 0.8.9 to 0.8.14 in /libs/partners/xai (#38094)
release(core): 1.4.6 (#38061)
feat(core,partners): add package version tracking to tracing metadata (#35295)
